description: Downloads and installs Ollama for running local LLMs. Configures models directory and PATH.

messages.ollamaNotFound: Ollama not found, downloading installer from ollama.com...
messages.modelsDirPrompt: Enter models directory path (press Enter for default)
messages.scriptDisabled: Ollama installation is disabled in config.
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Ollama removed, tracking purged.

commands.all: Install Ollama, configure models dir, pull default models (default)
commands.models: Configure models directory and pull models only
commands.pull: Pull default models only (requires Ollama installed)
commands.uninstall: Uninstall Ollama, remove tracking, clean up
